item.title: Comparison — Gaussian Splatting Reconstruction vs Geometry-Grounded Gaussian Splatting
item.description: Both approach families connect to `Novel View Synthesis` (Task). | Family | Papers | Shared target | | --- | --- | --- | | Gaussian Splatting Reconstruction | 7 | Novel View Synthesis | | Geometry-Grounded Gaussian Splatting | 1 | Novel View Synthesis |
item.dc:creator: LLM-Wiki

item.title: Field Overview — 3D/4D Vision and Reconstruction
item.description: Dynamic Gaussian Splatting (ApproachFamily) — 1 contributing paper(s) connect to this thread. Gaussian Splatting Reconstruction (ApproachFamily) — 7 contributing paper(s) connect to this thread. Geometry-Grounded Gaussian Splatting (ApproachFamily) — 1 contributing paper(s) connect to this thread. Visual SLAM (ResearchTopic) — 2 contributing paper(s) connect to this thread. World Model (ResearchTopic) — 3 contributing paper(s) connect to this thread. ## Representative concepts - GaussianFlow SLAM (Algorithm) - SDFRaster (Algorithm) - Multi-View Consistency (EvaluationProtocol) - Beam Search (InferenceStrategy) - Stochastic Solid (MathematicalConcept) - 4D Gaussian Splatting (MethodologicalConcept) - Gaussian Splatting (MethodologicalConcept) - Video Diffusion (MethodologicalConcept) - Vol…
